introSection: Crazy Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located on Blackpool South Pier in Blackpool, Lancashire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Crazy Coaster has previously operated as a travelling roller coaster and at Plopsaland De Panne in Adinkerke-DePanne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It operated in Arcadia City in Odessa, Ukraine, from 2014 to 2017.

In 2018, the roller coaster began operation on Blackpool South Pier. It is the second spinning coaster to operate on the pier. The first is now travelling in Germany.

fullText:
Crazy Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located on Blackpool South Pier in Blackpool, Lancashire, England, UK.

Crazy Coaster has previously operated as a travelling roller coaster and at Plopsaland De Panne in Adinkerke-DePanne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It operated in Arcadia City in Odessa, Ukraine, from 2014 to 2017.

In 2018, the roller coaster began operation on Blackpool South Pier. It is the second spinning coaster to operate on the pier. The first is now travelling in Germany.
